slides.title: Button Types 🖱️
slides.content:
# Buttons in Flutter

Common button widgets:

* `ElevatedButton` – filled button with elevation.
* `TextButton` – plain text button.
* `OutlinedButton` – button with a border.
* `IconButton` – clickable icon.

All buttons have an `onPressed` callback (null = disabled).

quizData.question: How do you disable a button?
quizData.explanation: When onPressed is null, the button is disabled and typically appears grayed out.

slides.title: Button Examples
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `Icon` and `Icons` class

Icons class provides Material Icons. You can also use custom icons with `ImageIcon`.
